commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds guarded snapshot/copy logic around plugin command definitions and tests unreadable/native metadata plus post-registration mutation behavior in the global command registry.

PR surface: Source +257, Tests +49. Total +306 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main reads and stores plugin-owned command metadata directly, and the PR still leaves the non-activating `registry.commands` path storing the original object consumed by gateway `commands.list`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can complete the snapshot storage path and add missing gateway/registry coverage; maintainer draft/protected status still controls whether to promote that work.

target.title: fix(plugins): snapshot command registrations
target.body:
## Summary
- Snapshot plugin command registrations through guarded field reads before validation and storage.
- Reject unreadable command metadata without poisoning later registrations.
- Copy optional command metadata so aliases, channel scopes, and prompt guidance cannot mutate after registration.

## Verification
- `CI=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_HEARTBEAT_MS=10000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/plugins/commands.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/plugins/command-registration.ts src/plugins/commands.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/plugins/command-registration.ts src/plugins/commands.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --label check-changed-command-registration --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` blocked: Crabbox sparse-sync root had 627.8 MiB free, requires 1.00 GiB.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: plugin command registration now handles unreadable command metadata as a failed registration and keeps later healthy commands registerable; stored optional metadata is copied before plugin-owned objects can mutate.
Real environment tested: local linked OpenClaw gwt worktree on macOS; Crabbox/Testbox broad gate unavailable due local disk/auth blockers.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran the focused plugin command Vitest file, oxfmt check, oxlint core config, and local Codex autoreview listed above.
Evidence after fix: `src/plugins/commands.test.ts` passed 51 tests after rebase; oxfmt and oxlint exited clean; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: unreadable `nativeNames` returns a stable registration error, a following healthy command registers, and stored native aliases/channel scopes/prompt guidance are unaffected by later fixture mutation.
What was not tested: `pnpm check:changed` could not run because Crabbox sparse-sync did not have the required 1 GiB free disk; Testbox is not authenticated in this environment.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
